---
title: "BCSE205L — Computer Architecture and Organization"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    css: index.css
---

## Lectures

<table>
<thead>
<tr><th>Module</th><th>Topic</th><th>Slides</th></tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<!-- <tr><td>1</td><td>Introduction to Computer Architecture and Organization</td><td><a href="lectures/M1-intro-architecture.html">View slides</a></td></tr> -->
<!-- <tr><td>2</td><td>Data Representation and Computer Arithmetic</td><td><a href="lectures/M2-data-representation-arithmetic.html">View slides</a></td></tr> -->
<!-- <tr><td>3</td><td>Instruction Sets and Control Unit</td><td><a href="lectures/M3-instruction-sets-control.html">View slides</a></td></tr> -->
<tr><td>4</td><td>Memory System Organization and Architecture</td><td><a href="lectures/M4-memory-systems.html">View slides</a></td></tr>
<tr><td>5</td><td>Interfacing and Communication</td><td><a href="lectures/M5-interfacing-communication.html">View slides</a></td></tr>
<!-- <tr><td>6</td><td>Subsystems</td><td><a href="lectures/M6-subsystems.html">View slides</a></td></tr> -->
<!-- <tr><td>7</td><td>High Performance Processors</td><td><a href="lectures/M7-high-performance-processors.html">View slides</a></td></tr> -->
<!-- <tr><td>8</td><td>Contemporary Issues</td><td><a href="lectures/M8-contemporary-issues.html">View slides</a></td></tr> -->
</tbody>
</table>

## Exam Syllabus

<table>
<thead>
<tr><th>Exam</th><th>Coverage</th><th></th></tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr><td>CAT-2</td><td>Module 3 (Phases of instruction cycle onwards), Module 4 (full), Module 5 (up to DMA)</td><td><a href="lectures/CAT2-syllabus.html">View</a></td></tr>
</tbody>
</table>
